blocks.content: Before giving an AI agent the keys to your terminal, we must establish our workspace. Choose the deployment tier that best fits your machine and risk tolerance.

blocks.title: ▶ TIER 1: Easy (Direct Binary Install)
blocks.description: Best for getting up and running quickly on a personal machine.
blocks.code:
# macOS & Linux
curl -sL https://dl.google.com/agv/install.sh | bash

# Windows (Winget)
winget install Google.Antigravity

blocks.title: ▶ TIER 2: Medium (Homebrew)
blocks.description: Best for macOS/Linux developers who want centralized dependency management.
blocks.code: brew tap google/antigravity && brew install google-antigravity

blocks.title: ▶ TIER 3: Advanced (Secure Container Sandbox)
blocks.description: Best for strict isolation. Launches an ephemeral container, preventing agents from altering your host OS.
items: **Linux:** `sudo apt install docker.io` or `sudo dnf install podman`
**Hardware Lab:** If using a bluefin-wtg lab machine, skip setup.

blocks.content: Open your terminal and initialize your environment. If using Tier 3, run the following to map a local volume and enter the sandbox:

blocks.title: Verify the Toolchain
blocks.content: Once inside, verify everything is staged perfectly without installing a single package:
blocks.code:
python3 --version
agv --version
python3 -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; print('✅ Playwright is ready.')"
